name: EzFill Holdings, Inc.
description: EzFill Holdings, Inc. is a leading provider of on-demand mobile fueling services. The company offers a convenient, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly alternative to traditional gas stations by delivering fuel directly to customers' vehicles, whether at home, work, or in fleet locations. Operating primarily in Florida, EzFill serves individual consumers, commercial fleets, and specialty operators, leveraging its proprietary mobile app and specialized delivery trucks to streamline the fueling process and reduce carbon emissions associated with driving to gas stations.
